children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 12 months after , the Secretary shall promulgate final regulations for the implementation of this subchapter. All regulations promulgated pursuant to this subchapter shall be developed by the Secretary with the full and active participation of the Indian tribes with trust funds held by the Secretary and other affected Indian tribes.October 25, 1994

children.heading: Effect
children.label: b Effect
children.text: The lack of promulgated regulations shall not limit the effect of this subchapter.
